programmes.show_description: Crime thriller with Sylvester Stallone. After suffering a brain injury, the only surviving thief from a bank heist is given an experimental drug to rebuild his memory and help crack the case.
Sci-fi sequel with Patrick Bergin. Computerised megalomaniac Jobe returns in a bid to take over the world from cyberspace, and only a youngster and a scientist stand in his way.

After receiving a large settlement cheque, a woman purchases breast augmentation surgery and is cared for by a friend. They then fight over a loan.
A woman admits that she promised to pay for her incarcerated son's property damage; when she changes her mind, her Harley is towed by his ex-roommate.
A couple shell out $4,000 to a man for a mobile home only to discover that he doesn't even own the trailer and has allegedly sold it more than once.
When the Judge realises that a fight over a used Mercedes Benz lacks critical evidence, she reminds lax litigants that she has better things to do.
A young woman plans a cruise with her mother only to have the trip cancelled; she is accused of pocketing the refund and going on a cruise with her aunt.
A woman accuses her ex-lover of destroying over $2,000 worth of clothing in an alleged fit of jealousy.
When an executive closes her company, she illegally leases her space to another businesswoman who also closes her company.
After a neighbourhood catfight breaks out, the Judge must decide how injuries were inflicted when both women deny placing their hands on each other.
When an unleashed Pit Bull confronts a woman and her dog, she claims her pet defended her and took the brunt of the vicious attack.

An accounts worker at a cancer hospital syphons off six hundred and forty-two thousand pounds of NHS money.
A manager treats the NHS like a cash machine. An organised crime gang try to swindle thirteen million pounds.
Samira was a fashion model in Paris when she met Adam Frasch. In 2014, Samira's handyman arrives to their home and is horrified to find Samira dead in the family pool.
Self-Made and Murdered: In this programme, each episode reveals a new murder in which the killer or victim lived a life of luxury and wealth.

OnTrax presents Inspired Music and Arts Soul Fundraiser, an exciting event raising money for a mix of cancer supporting charities.

An inquisitive newspaper columnist interviews glamourous movie star Pamela Morris at her lavish mansion, hoping to find the key to her apparent immortality.
An irritable taxi driver insults his TV repairman, and is later horrified to see secrets from his private life - and their horrific consequences - revealed on his TV set.
Crime thriller with Christian Slater. Notorious gangsters Bugsy Siegel and Lucky Luciano make a daring bid to overthrow the dons of Twenties New York.
Tense action thriller with John Cena. A New Orleans detective must complete a series of dangerous games to rescue his kidnapped girlfriend from a vengeful criminal mastermind.
Action thriller with Bruce Willis. With his young son held hostage, a desperate father is forced into helping a criminal gang evade a police chief investigating a bank robbery.
Crime drama with professional wrestler Triple H. After being released from prison, an ex-con is pulled back into his old world when his best friend is involved in an accidental shooting.

A mother of five is left stranded with three additional children when her friend heads to the Dominican Republic on vacation and does not return on time.
Two young men allegedly get into trouble with the law for drug possession; both families fight over duelling restraining orders.
A woman's prized lamp from Paris is allegedly damaged by a moving company; movers claim she misrepresent the size of the job.
The Judge grills a diamond expert about the quality of diamonds he and his ex-wife are fighting over.
A woman living rent-free in an international boarding house accuses the homeowner of renting rooms illegally and of having her falsely arrested.
This question is posed to a man who defends his Pit Bull's attack of a smaller dog by saying the animal could have locked jaws and killed if he'd wanted to.
A truant high school student is shuttled between her mother and father's homes leaving them fighting over discipline and a crushed cell phone.
When ex-lovers fight over custody of a joint bank account, the Judge reminds them of the three rules of her courtroom.
While the Judge gets a year younger, a 13-year-old allegedly steals a car and totals it two blocks from home.

A young UK student is raped and murdered. Surveillance footage traps a serial sex offender. A jazz musician and his new girlfriend are murdered a week apart by her jealous ex.
Pregnant Summer Tatum was shot twice in the head by her husband after she discovered his online affair. Andreen McDonald, a businesswoman, was killed by her husband, Andre, with a hammer.
A filmmaker tries to solve a real-life murder - the victim, his wife's sister. Sixteen years later, can they find her killer?
Police recovered a submerged car but the driver was missing. Evidence found inside the car would lead them down a trail of obsession.
When a man reported that his girlfriend had shot and killed herself, a post mortem ruled against suicide. But who killed her and why?

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Alex seeks to prosecute a gang who terrorises witnesses with arson...
Action thriller with Keanu Reeves. When two scientists devise a revolutionary way to produce energy from water, their work is sabotaged and they're framed for the murder of their mentor.
Thriller with Steven Seagal. When an alcoholic ex-detective learns of his estranged son's murder, he hits the streets on a crusade for justice, and winds up taking on the mob.
